raw_consumer_statement:
I purchased a service for {$450.00} on XXXX. The merchant charged my card and immediately locked my account, preventing me from receiving the service. I contacted XXXX asking them either to refund the service that I don't have access to or to restore access. They refused to unlock the account and also refused to refund the service, claiming it is non-refundable. 

I then reached out to Amex to dispute the transaction. Amex is upholding the non-refundable clause despite the fact that the merchant refused to provide the service I paid for, which is a violation of the Fair Credit Billing Act.
